name: Hotel Review Sentiment
description: Analyze the sentiment of hotel reviews in San Francisco using AI to classify each review as positive, negative, or neutral.
before_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r.author,
       r.content AS review_text
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE h.city = "San Francisco"
LIMIT 5
after_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r.author,
       r.content AS review_text,
       default:ai_sentiment({"text": r.content, "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 500}) AS sentiment
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE h.city = "San Francisco"
LIMIT 5

name: Hotel Description Summary
description: Condense verbose hotel descriptions into concise summaries, making it easy to scan and compare properties at a glance.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       description AS full_description
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
WHERE description IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3
after_query:
SELECT name,
       description AS full_description,
       default:ai_summary({"text": description, "max_words": 30, "temperature": 0.4}) AS summary
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
WHERE description IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3

name: Airline Type Classification
description: Classify airlines as commercial, charter, cargo, or regional based on their name and metadata using AI.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       callsign,
       country
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.airline
LIMIT 10
after_query:
SELECT name,
       callsign,
       country,
       default:ai_classification({"text": name, "labels": ["commercial", "charter", "cargo", "regional"], "temperature": 0.2}) AS airline_type
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.airline
LIMIT 10

name: Landmark Entity Extraction
description: Extract people, organizations, locations, and dates mentioned in landmark descriptions using AI.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       content AS description
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.landmark
WHERE content IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3
after_query:
SELECT name,
       content AS description,
       default:ai_extraction({"text": content, "labels": ["person", "organization", "location", "date"], "temperature": 0.2, "max_tokens": 1000}) AS entities
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.landmark
WHERE content IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3

name: Review Grammar Correction
description: Clean up hotel reviews by correcting grammar, spelling, and punctuation using AI.
before_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r.content AS original_review
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE r.content IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3
after_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r.content AS original_review,
       default:ai_corrected_grammar({"text": r.content, "temperature": 0.2, "max_tokens": 3000}) AS corrected_review
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE r.content IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3

name: Hotel Promo Tagline
description: Generate a one-sentence promotional tagline for hotels using AI, based on the hotel name and city.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       city,
       free_breakfast,
       free_internet,
       free_parking
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
WHERE vacancy = true
LIMIT 5
after_query:
SELECT name,
       city,
       free_breakfast,
       free_internet,
       free_parking,
       default:ai_generated_text({"prompt": "Write a one-sentence promotional tagline for a hotel called " || name || " in " || city, "temperature": 0.8, "max_tokens": 200}) AS promo_tagline
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
WHERE vacancy = true
LIMIT 5

name: Landmark PII Masking
description: Redact sensitive information like person names, locations, emails, and phone numbers from landmark descriptions.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       content AS original_text
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.landmark
WHERE content IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3
after_query:
SELECT name,
       content AS original_text,
       default:ai_masked({"text": content, "labels": ["person", "location", "email", "phone"], "temperature": 0.2, "max_tokens": 3000}) AS masked_text
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.landmark
WHERE content IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3

name: Review Similarity Scoring
description: Compare pairs of hotel reviews and score their similarity from 0 to 1 using AI.
before_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r1.content AS review_1,
       r2.content AS review_2
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r1
UNNEST h.reviews AS r2
WHERE r1.author != r2.author
LIMIT 3
after_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r1.content AS review_1,
       r2.content AS review_2,
       default:ai_similarity({"text1": r1.content, "text2": r2.content, "temperature": 0.0, "max_tokens": 500}) AS similarity_score
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r1
UNNEST h.reviews AS r2
WHERE r1.author != r2.author
LIMIT 3

name: Hotel Description Translation
description: Translate English hotel descriptions into Spanish using AI, enabling multilingual content delivery.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       description AS english_description
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
WHERE description IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 2
after_query:
SELECT name,
       description AS english_description,
       default:ai_translation({"text": description, "to_language": "es", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 2000}) AS spanish_description
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
WHERE description IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 2

name: AI Concierge Recommendation
description: Generate personalized travel recommendations for hotels using a custom AI concierge prompt.
before_query:
SELECT name,
       city,
       country
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
LIMIT 5
after_query:
SELECT name,
       city,
       country,
       default:ai_completion({"system_prompt": "You are a travel concierge. Write a brief, enthusiastic 2-sentence recommendation for why a traveler should stay at this hotel.", "user_prompt": "Hotel: " || name || ", City: " || city || ", Country: " || country, "temperature": 0.7, "max_tokens": 300}) AS concierge_recommendation
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel
LIMIT 5

name: Full Intelligence Stack
description: Apply sentiment analysis, summarization, and entity extraction to hotel reviews in a single query — showing AI Functions compose naturally in SQL++.
before_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r.content AS raw_review
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE h.city = "London"
LIMIT 2
after_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       r.content AS raw_review,
       default:ai_sentiment({"text": r.content, "temperature": 0.3}) AS sentiment,
       default:ai_summary({"text": r.content, "max_words": 20, "temperature": 0.4}) AS summary,
       default:ai_extraction({"text": r.content, "labels": ["person", "location"], "temperature": 0.2}) AS entities
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE h.city = "London"
LIMIT 2

name: What If Your Database Could Think?
description: The hero query: summarize, score sentiment, generate a tagline, and translate — all in one SQL++ statement. This is the opening demo moment.
before_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       h.city,
       h.country,
       h.description,
       r.content AS review
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE h.city = "Paris"
LIMIT 1
after_query:
SELECT h.name AS hotel_name,
       h.city,
       h.country,
       default:ai_summary({"text": h.description, "max_words": 25, "temperature": 0.4}) AS summary,
       default:ai_sentiment({"text": r.content, "temperature": 0.3}) AS review_sentiment,
       default:ai_generated_text({"prompt": "Write a 10-word tagline for " || h.name || " in " || h.city, "temperature": 0.8, "max_tokens": 100}) AS tagline,
       default:ai_translation({"text": h.description, "to_language": "fr", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 1000}) AS french_description
FROM `travel-sample`.inventory.hotel AS h
UNNEST h.reviews AS r
WHERE h.city = "Paris"
LIMIT 1
